button.t-att-title: state.autoRefresh ? (tr('Auto-refresh ON — fetches live data every ') + autoMin + tr(' min. Click to turn off.')) : (tr('Turn on auto-refresh (every ') + autoMin + tr(' min)'))
isDark ? tr('Switch to light background (this panel)') : tr('Switch to dark background (this panel)')

button.t-esc: state.customize ? tr('✔ Save and close') : tr('⚙ Settings')

div.div: ⚠ A new version is installed — you are viewing an older one. Click here to reload.

span.t-esc: tr('wishes and improvements in the solution')

button.t-esc: state.suggest.saving ? tr('Sending …') : tr('Drop in the box')

span.t-esc: tr('It has been dropped in the box and will be reviewed.')

button.t-att-title: tr('The percentage is added on top of hour-based progress')

textarea.placeholder: Write a note — saved to the log …

button.t-att-title: tr('Open SP area ') + a.nr + tr(' in SharePoint')

div.strong: Settings – choose content in the Control room

button.t-esc: state.upgrading ? tr('Upgrading …') : tr('⬆ Upgrade the module now')

div.span: ⚠ The Upgrade button requires the FIQ admin role on your user — until it is set, upgrade under Apps.

button.title: A new GUI version is only fetched on a full page load — ⟳ Refresh only fetches data

div.div: Claude connection active — «Ask AI» in the top bar uses this. Test the AI connection

input.placeholder: Write a directive/message to the session — it reads it at the next sync …

div.strong: Coming to this board (designed, built step by step):

ul.li: 🟢🟠🔴 Approval queue — decisions from AI in one place, with standing-rule answers
AI tasks «on the fly» — ask AI to execute, follow status here
ROI tracking — time saved (AI vs. human) per task
AI usage and costs per period

div.title: AI platform projects (tag «AI-plattform», set automatically by Coworker) or the customer's internal projects

button.title: Consumption tracking: logged vs. estimated hours

t.div: No in the selected scope yet — they appear here when Coworker creates them.

div.div:
of tasks done —
Done In progress Waiting

span.t-att-title: ct.st === 'ferdig' ? tr('Reopen the task') : tr('Mark as done')

span.t-on-click.stop: () => this.openVarBox({ id: ct.id, name: ct.name, no: ct.no }, true)
span.t-att-title: tr('Open the details box (dates, hours, progress)')

div.div: No tasks in the selected project yet.

div.p: Own view under construction – content will appear here. Expected delivery: 2026-08-07.

div.t-att-class: 'fiq_hm_chip_p fiq_hm_chip_click fiq_hm_pres_' + (pr.farge || 'grey') + ((state.selPerson and state.selPerson.id === pr.id) ? ' valgt' : '')
div.t-att-title: pr.tekst + tr(' — click to show alerts/meetings/activities for ') + pr.navn

t.div: No lines to show for the selection.

div.title: Show both, only meetings or only activities

button.t-att-title: dg.has ? tr('Meetings this day — click to show') : dg.iso

t.div: Select an activity in the list — the details are shown here.

div.span: All available items have been added.

div.div: Press «⚙ Customize» and choose the reports/dashboards you want here — the choice is remembered.

input.title: Reference date for the period (Day/Week/Month counted from this)

button.t-att-title: state.projLock ? tr('Unlock the project view') : tr('Lock the project view to this grouping — all filters work within it')

tr.t-att-class: ((state.selected and state.selected.model === 'project.project' and state.selected.id === p.id) ? 'fiq_hm_selrow' : '') + (p.depth ? ' fiq_hm_childrow' : '')

div.t-esc: (state.projQuery or state.projNoQuery) ? tr('No projects match the search.') : tr('No active projects yet.')

div.t-att-class: 'fiq_hm_task' + ((state.selected and state.selected.model === 'project.task' and state.selected.id === t.id) ? ' fiq_hm_selrow' : '')

span.title: Estimated (assumed) hours – adjust; progress = logged ÷ estimated

t.div: No open tasks assigned to you.

button.title: Show task progress (selected project, otherwise the first)

button.t-att-title: state.progSubs ? tr('Subtasks shown — click for main tasks only') : tr('Also show subtasks')

input.title: Reference date for the period (Day/Week/Month counted from this)

div.t-att-class: 'fiq_hm_rrow' + ((state.selected and state.selected.model === progModel and state.selected.id === p.id) ? ' fiq_hm_selrow' : '')

span.t-att-title: tr('Open the details box (dates, hours, progress)')

div.t-esc: state.progLevel === 'oppgave' ? tr('No tasks in the project.') : tr('No projects.')

div.t-att-class: 'fiq_hm_cg_row' + ((state.selected and state.selected.model === progModel and state.selected.id === g.id) ? ' fiq_hm_selrow' : '')

span.t-att-title: tr('Open the details box (dates, hours, progress)')
g.name + ' — ' + g.progress + ' % (' + (g.farge === 'red' ? tr('past deadline') : g.farge === 'yellow' ? tr('at risk') : g.farge === 'done' ? tr('done') : tr('on track')) + ')'

div.t-esc: state.progLevel === 'oppgave' ? tr('No tasks in the project.') : tr('No projects.')

textarea.placeholder: Write a note — saved to the log …

t.span: Full chat/conversation: open the record in Odoo with ⤢.

t.div: Select a task or a project to see details here.
No communication in the selected period.

t.t-props: { firm: state.companyId, har000: state.har000, label: slotLabel }
